text.glad.5: Jeg lærer noget nyt og forstår det.
text.glad.7: Nogen siger noget pænt til mig.
text.lei.0: Nogen siger noget grimt til mig.
text.lei.1: Jeg må ikke være med til at lege.
text.lei.2: Nogen jeg holder af er syg.
text.sint.0: Jeg føler mig dum og forstår det ikke.
text.sint.4: Nogen er slem ved min ven.
text.overrasket.1: Jeg møder en ven på gaden.
text.overrasket.4: Jeg ser noget, jeg aldrig har set før.
privacy.title: [TODO: translate] Privacy Policy - MoodMate
privacy.intro: [TODO: translate] This document outlines how MoodMate handles user data, ensuring compliance with GDPR principles and protecting the privacy of our young users and their guardians.
privacy.section1.title: [TODO: translate] 1. Data Collection & Minimization
privacy.section1.body: [TODO: translate] In accordance with the principle of Data Minimization, we only collect the bare minimum of information required to provide the core functionality of the emotion journal.
privacy.fields.id: [TODO: translate] ID: A randomly generated hex-string (anonymous internal identifier).
privacy.fields.nickname: [TODO: translate] Nickname: A display name for the parent/guardian (no full legal name required).
privacy.fields.scrambledSecret: [TODO: translate] Scrambled Secret: A mock-hashed version of the user's secret code to ensure security without storing plain-text passwords.
privacy.fields.consentFlag: [TODO: translate] Consent Flag: A boolean value and a timestamp (consentedAt) as legal proof of parental agreement.
privacy.fields.childrenProfiles: [TODO: translate] Children Profiles: A list of first names/nicknames to allow multiple children to use the same parent account without sharing logs.
privacy.section2.title: [TODO: translate] 2. Purpose of Processing
privacy.section2.body: [TODO: translate] We process this data solely to allow parents and children to log emotional entries over time and to visualize mood trends and coping strategies for the family.
privacy.section3.title: [TODO: translate] 3. Parental Consent & Children's Privacy
privacy.section3.body: [TODO: translate] MoodMate is designed for children aged 6-7. As children under 13 cannot legally provide their own consent, active parental consent is a prerequisite for account creation. Registration is disabled until the guardian has explicitly checked the consent box. Guardians act as the primary account owners.
privacy.section4.title: [TODO: translate] 4. Security & Storage
privacy.section4.body: [TODO: translate] No plain-text passwords: All secrets are scrambled (hashed) before storage. In this version data is stored in-memory (RAM), and is not persisted across server restarts.
privacy.section5.title: [TODO: translate] 5. Your Rights (GDPR)
privacy.section5.body: [TODO: translate] Users have the right to request deletion (right to be forgotten) and to request access or portability of their data.
terms.title: [TODO: translate] Terms of Service - MoodMate
terms.intro: [TODO: translate] Welcome to MoodMate. By creating an account, you (the Parent/Guardian) agree to the following terms.
terms.section1.title: [TODO: translate] 1. Data Ownership
terms.section1.body: [TODO: translate] You retain full ownership of all data you and your child input into MoodMate. By using the service, you grant us a limited license to process and display this data solely for the purpose of providing your mood journal and insights.
terms.section2.title: [TODO: translate] 2. Parental Responsibility
terms.section2.body: [TODO: translate] MoodMate is designed for children aged 6-7. As the account creator, you are responsible for supervising your child's use of the application and ensuring that the content remains appropriate.
terms.section3.title: [TODO: translate] 3. Acceptable Use & Data Privacy
terms.section3.body: [TODO: translate] To maintain the safety and privacy of your family: do not input sensitive personal identifiers such as physical addresses, phone numbers, or social security numbers into free-text fields. The service should only be used for its intended purpose: emotional logging and reflection.
terms.section4.title: [TODO: translate] 4. Consent and Withdrawal
terms.section4.body: [TODO: translate] Account creation requires active consent. You have the right to withdraw this consent at any time.
terms.section5.title: [TODO: translate] 5. Termination & Deletion
terms.section5.body: [TODO: translate] You may delete your account at any time through the application settings. Upon deletion, all associated data will be permanently purged.
terms.section6.title: [TODO: translate] 6. Disclaimer
terms.section6.body: [TODO: translate] MoodMate is a tool for emotional reflection and is not a substitute for professional medical advice or mental health therapy.
